title.si: තක්කාලි වගාව — කෘෂිකර්ම දෙපාර්තමේන්තුව / HORDI නිර්දේශය
title.ta: தக்காளி பயிர்ச்செய்கை — வேளாண் திணைக்களம் / HORDI பரிந்துரை

summary.en: HORDI recommendation for tomato (Solanum lycopersicon) across almost all Sri Lankan agro-ecological zones except up-country wet zone. Nursery establishment mid-March or end-August; transplant 14–18 days after sowing at 80 × 50 cm. Three-stage fertilizer schedule. Yield 20–30 t/ha.
summary.si: තක්කාලි (Solanum lycopersicon) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය — උඩරට තෙත් කලාපය හැර ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සියලුම කෘෂි-පරිසර කලාපවල වැඩේ. මාර්තු මැද හෝ අගෝස්තු අග දී පැළ ඇඳල් පිහිටුවන්න; වපුරා දින 14-18 දී 80 × 50 cm පර‌ාස ඇතිව රෝපණය කරන්න. අදියර තුනක පොහොර වැඩසටහන. අස්වැන්න හෙක්ටයාරයකට ටොන් 20-30.
summary.ta: மலைநாட்டு ஈர வலயம் தவிர்த்து இலங்கையின் ஏறக்குறைய அனைத்து வேளாண்-சூழல் வலயங்களிலும் தக்காளி (Solanum lycopersicon) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. மார்ச் நடுப்பகுதி அல்லது ஆகஸ்ட் இறுதியில் நாற்றங்கால் அமைக்கவும்; விதைத்த 14-18 நாட்களுக்குள் 80 × 50 cm இடைவெளியில் நடவு செய்யவும். மூன்று கட்ட உர அட்டவணை. மகசூல் ஒரு ஹெக்டேருக்கு 20-30 டன்.

field_provenance.notes: Transcribed from HORDI public cultivation page. Yield converted from DOA's t/ha (20–30) to kg/acre (approx 8,000–12,000). Badulla district exception for TSP rate (215 kg/ha) noted in provenance on the basal-fertilizer activity.

body.en: Prepare the nursery in mid-March or end-August. Well-drained loamy soil with pH 5.5–7.5; add organic matter.
Apply basal fertilizer 1–2 days before planting. Incorporate 10 t/ha of well-decomposed organic matter plus 6–12 t/ha decomposed manure in planting holes.

notes.en: Badulla district: apply at 215 kg/ha instead.

body.en: Transplant seedlings with 3–5 true leaves, 14–18 days after sowing. Spacing 80 × 50 cm. Seed requirement 200–250 g/ha.

name.en: Tomato seed (HORDI Tomato hybrid 03 / Thilina / Maheshi / KC-1 / Lanka Cherry)

body.en: Harvest when fruits reach green-yellow stage. Expected yield 20–30 t/ha.

notes.en: Damping-off (Pythium / Phytophthora / Fusarium / Rhizoctonia / Sclerotium / Colletotrichum spp.) at nursery stage. Seed treatment: Thiram 80 WP 5 g/kg seed or Homai 4 g/kg. Soil drench: Thiram 80 WP 7 g per 5 L per m², or Homai 5 g per 5 L per m².
Early blight (Alternaria solani). Spray Mancozeb 80% WP 20 g/10 L; or Metalaxyl 8% + Mancozeb 64% WP 12.5 g/10 L; or Metiram 55% + Pyraclostrobin 5% WG 8 ml/10 L.
Late blight (Phytophthora infestans). Same fungicide rotation as early blight — Mancozeb / Metalaxyl-Mancozeb / Metiram-Pyraclostrobin.
Powdery mildew (Oidium lycopersicum). Apply sulfur 80% WG 50 g/10 L; or Chlorothalonil 500 g/L SC 30 ml/10 L; or Carbendazim 50% WP 7 g/10 L.
Septoria leaf spot (Septoria lycopersici). Daconil 15–30 ml/10 L; Mancozeb 20 ml/10 L; Topsin 6 g/10 L; Carbendazim 7 g/10 L.
Bacterial wilt (Ralstonia solanacearum). No chemical control — use wilt-resistant varieties, rotate with non-solanaceous crops, and practice field sanitation.
TYLCV transmitted by whiteflies. Use disease-free seed, keep fields weed-free, and suppress whitefly vectors with insecticides approved in DOA 2019 recommendation.
